transcription.text: You're entering the leisure time world of Bob Sharp, member of the Sports Car Club of America. Bob's qualifying on a challenging course, a grueling test of machines and men. Bob Sharp's a camel smoker. He enjoys the clean-cut taste of rich tobaccos. The best tobacco makes the best smoke. Get with Camel. Every inch a real smoke. Camel is a real cigarette. Comfortably smooth, too.
